title: clinopodium insulare
intro: Clinopodium insulare, also known as Kauai clinopodium, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clinopodium insulare include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve headaches and fever, and provide antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies for its therapeutic benefits.
